description_long: This is a large, commercial-style refrigerator with a rectangular form and four transparent glass doors on the front, each revealing multiple interior shelves. The frame is predominantly dark, likely metal, with a blue accent along the top and bottom edges, giving it a modern, utilitarian appearance. The sides are solid and opaque, while the back is completely flat and featureless, suggesting it is designed to be placed against a wall. The interior is spacious, with several horizontal shelves visible through the glass, suitable for storing a variety of perishable goods. The doors appear to be sliding or hinged, with vertical divisions between each section. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, typical for use in grocery stores, convenience shops, or urban food markets.
description: A large, commercial refrigerator with four glass doors and multiple interior shelves, framed in dark metal with blue accents. Designed for urban retail or food service environments, it features a modern, robust appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing four transparent glass doors with visible interior shelving and blue accent trim.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the refrigerator and the solid, opaque side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat, featureless black back panel with blue trim at the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid side and interior shelves through the glass.
attribute_door_handle_style: Vertical, integrated handles along the edge of each glass door, flush with the frame.
